title: Reusable Totem of Undying
description: This mod enables the ability to reuse the Totem of Undying by repairing it after it has been used.
body: This mod makes the **Totem of Undying** reusable. Whenever a player triggers a normal Totem of Undying, it is replaced with a **Broken Totem of Undying**. - The broken totem appears in the same hand where the original was used. This ensures that every time a Totem of Undying saves you, it leaves behind a relic. The Broken Totem can then be used to craft a new **Totem of Undying**. ![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d57fbfe647f6660001b38c5e7441f091d00ebf8.webp) A small, lightweight mod that keeps the Use of the Totem alive even after use! If you find any issue you can report it here: [Issue Tracker](https://github.com/TheToicraft/Reusable-Totem-of-Undying-Minecraft-Mod/issues/new)
